data.title: SC6 validation: seeded phantom test + suggestion quality audit
data.description:
Run validation per SC6: seed 5 known phantom mappings and verify detection. Audit suggestion quality.

## Steps
1. Create 5 test files that fuzzy-match source files but contain no imports/calls
2. Add entries to .test-index
3. Run analyze-test-gate-log.sh — confirm all 5 flagged as PHANTOM
4. Audit first 10 .test-index-suggestions entries for correctness
5. Record results as epic comment

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] 5 seeded phantoms all detected
  Verify: echo "Verified by validation run"
- [ ] Results recorded on epic
  Verify: .claude/scripts/dso ticket show c13f-6196 2>/dev/null | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()); assert any('phantom' in c.get('body','').lower() or 'validation' in c.get('body','').lower() for c in d.get('comments',[]))"
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
